meta.title: Chat Fine tuning
meta.description:
*ADVANCED Fine-tuning Repository Access*
1. Unsupervised + Supervised Fine-tuning Notebooks
2. Q&A Dataset Preparation + Cleaning Scripts
3. Scripts to create and use Embeddings
4. Quantization Scripts
Learn more at: https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/

*Chat fine-tuning Script*
Buy Access Here: https://buy.stripe.com/5kAaFq4pLbe3bQYcNf

*Resources:*
- Presentation Slides: https://tinyurl.com/4dxty3n8
- Runpod Affiliate Link: (supports Trelis) https://tinyurl.com/yjxbdc9w
- Llama 2 instruction fine-tuning dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/openassistant-llama-style

Relevant Videos:
- Tiny Llama (run a GGUF model on your laptop): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T5l228844NI

0:00 LLM instruction fine-tuning

1:10 Understanding special tokens and stop tokens

6:05 Llama 2 prompt format
6:55 chatml prompt format
9:16 Instruction fine-tuning datasets
11:36 Fine-tuning a model for chat (in Jupyter lab)
16:00 Chat fine-tuning results
17:41 Pro tips
